plugins.name: mini-research
plugins.description: Execute a scaled-down research workflow from question formulation, literature search, paper reading, synthesis to conclusion writing

plugins.name: research-proposal
plugins.description: Generate academic research proposals for PhD applications following Nature Reviews-style writing conventions. Supports STEM, humanities, and social sciences with 6-phase workflow: requirements gathering, literature collection, outline generation, content writing, output review, and PDF conversion. Supports English and Chinese output.

plugins.name: telegram-message-handler
plugins.description: Handle Telegram messages for a personal bot. Check for new messages, process requests, and send responses back via the Telegram Bot API. Supports authorized single-user mode with automatic message filtering and error handling.
